-Koch Fertilizer Canada’s (KFC) Plant effluent contains nutrients that are beneficial for forage crop production. KFC irrigates local agricultural lands with Plant effluent in compliance with applicable license requirements and regulations. The effluent contains ammonia, phosphorus and nitrates that are reported to the National Pollutant Release Inventory. The application of nutrient-rich Plant effluent onto agricultural land for crop production is categorized as “Disposal—Land Application’’.

Koch Fertilizer Canada ULC (KFC)plant effluent contains nutrients that are beneficial for forage crop production. KFC irrigates local agricultural lands with plant effluent in compliance with applicable license requirement and regulations. The effluent contains ammonia, phosphorus and nitrate that are reported to NPRI. The application of nutrient rich plant effluent onto agriculture land for crop production is categorized as " disposal - land application
